code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a numbered grid with one icon in each cell
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_shape_count: How many "{target_shape_name}" icons are in row {line_number}?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_shape_count: How many "{target_shape_name}" icons are in column {line_number}?
code_prompt_defaults.scoped_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every counted "{target_shape_name}" icon in {line_kind} {line_number}
code_prompt_defaults.scoped_answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_most_shape_number: Which row has the most "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_fewest_shape_number: Which row has the fewest "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_most_shape_number: Which column has the most "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_fewest_shape_number: Which column has the fewest "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.extreme_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for the "{target_shape_name}" icons in the selected {line_kind}
code_prompt_defaults.extreme_answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected {line_kind} number as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_at_least_shape_count: How many rows contain at least {threshold} "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_at_least_shape_coun: How many columns contain at least {threshold} "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_exactly_shape_count: How many rows contain exactly {threshold} "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_exactly_shape_count: How many columns contain exactly {threshold} "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_no_shape_count: How many rows contain no "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_no_shape_count: How many columns contain no "{target_shape_name}" icons?
code_prompt_defaults.group_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every qualifying {line_kind} region
code_prompt_defaults.group_answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of qualifying {line_kind_plural} as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_row_unordered_adjacent_pai: In row {line_number}, how many adjacent two-cell pairs contain one "{first_shape_name}" icon and one "{second_shape_name}" icon? Count overlapping adjacent pairs separately.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_column_unordered_adjacent_: In column {line_number}, how many adjacent two-cell pairs contain one "{first_shape_name}" icon and one "{second_shape_name}" icon? Count overlapping adjacent pairs separately.
code_prompt_defaults.adjacency_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of line segments [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], one segment between the centers of each counted adjacent pair in {line_kind} {line_number}
code_prompt_defaults.adjacency_answer_hint: set "answer" to the adjacent-pair count as an integer
